steps.title: Confirm scene safety
steps.description: Confirm scene is safe. Ensure clean environment for delivery if imminent. Prepare delivery kit (sterile gloves, clamps, scissors, cord ties, clean towels).

steps.title: Assess gestational age and presentation
steps.description: Determine estimated gestational age (weeks). Ask about: contractions (frequency, duration, intensity), rupture of membranes (time, colour of liquor — clear, meconium-stained, bloody), amount of fluid, any vaginal bleeding.

steps.title: Assess fetal heart rate
steps.description: If Doppler or fetoscope available, auscultate fetal heart rate. Normal: 110-160 bpm. Note any bradycardia (<110) or tachycardia (>160). If no equipment, document 'FHR not assessable'.

steps.title: Record maternal vitals
steps.description: Record: BP, HR, RR, SpO2, consciousness (AVPU), temperature. Note any signs of pre-eclampsia (BP ≥140/90, headache, visual disturbance, epigastric pain).

steps.title: Assess for imminent delivery
steps.description: If crowning or urge to push: delivery is imminent. Do NOT delay transport for non-imminent deliveries. If delivery is imminent, prepare for field delivery.

steps.title: Assist with field delivery (if imminent)
steps.description: Support delivery with gentle controlled traction during contractions. Clear baby's airway. Dry and stimulate. Clamp and cut cord (two clamps, cut between). Note time of delivery.
steps.guideline_ref: Kenya BLS/ACLS Field Protocol — Emergency Delivery

steps.title: Manage third stage (placenta)
steps.description: After delivery, deliver placenta by controlled cord traction with uterine massage. Do NOT pull on cord. Examine placenta for completeness. Note any excessive bleeding.

steps.title: Assess for postpartum haemorrhage
steps.description: Estimate blood loss. Normal: <500ml. PPH: >500ml. Note: soak count, pool estimation, maternal vital sign changes (tachycardia, hypotension, pallor, altered consciousness).

steps.title: Manage haemorrhage
steps.description: Fundal massage (firm uterus in midline). If bleeding continues: bimanual compression. Keep mother warm. Elevate legs if signs of shock. Expedite transport.

steps.title: Determine disposition
steps.description: Record destination facility. Ensure receiving facility notified of: gestational age, complications, delivery status, estimated blood loss, maternal and fetal condition. Request standby obstetric team.
